scripts.test: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup up --build -d db backend frontend && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup run --rm --build tests
scripts.lint: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup up --build -d db backend frontend && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup run --rm --build tests npm run -w backend lint && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup run --rm --build tests npm run -w frontend lint
scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup up --build -d db backend frontend && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -p neighborhoodpickup run --rm --build tests
